name: Invisible Monsters: Serial Killers in America
original_name: Invisible Monsters: Serial Killers in America
overview: Examine the intersecting paths of five of America’s most notorious killers–Ted Bundy, John Wayne Gacy, Jeffrey Dahmer, The Green River Killer and BTK–who all operated during the same period, across two decades.

trailers.title: Sneak Peek: “Invisible Monsters: Serial Killers in America” Premieres Sun, Aug 15 @ 9pm ET/PT on A&E
